Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-31 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long LINC dominates today's ranking at #1 with a score of 95.2, displaying exceptional long-term momentum across all timeframes—returning 1,494% over 10 years, 498% over 5 years, and 158% over 1 year, all while outperforming SPY by 1,282% over the decade. The stock passes 4 out of 5 momentum ratio thresholds, trades above all major moving averages, and shows a "clean" momentum signal with a "strong_buy" flag, suggesting sustained uptrend without red flags. CLMT ranks second with similarly strong near-term returns (168% over 1 year, 506% over 5 years) but shows a critical weakness: its 10-year return of only 161% and negative 10-year underperformance versus SPY (-52%) and QQQ (-262%) indicate recent explosive growth that reversed much longer-term losses. The correlation data reveals both stocks lean toward cyclical sectors—LINC correlates most with XLB (materials) at 0.361 and shows minimal correlation with defensive assets like commodities—suggesting these are secular growth plays rather than market-hedging positions.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
